title: Black and White Striped Balloons 18 Inch Striped Mylar Foil Balloons Round Halloween Aluminum Helium Balloon for Halloween Birthday Baby Shower Party Decorations
features: 👻Black and White Striped Balloons: Include 6 pieces 18 inch black white striped balloons, 1pcs straw and 1pcs white ribbon. Halloween foil balloon can match your birthday babyshower parties theme.

💀 Quality Materials: These striped foil balloons are made of high quality aluminum foil, all the balloons 18 inch are safe, non-toxic, strong and light. The halloween decor foil balloons can be reused; These balloons are easy to be inflated, but not easy to be pierced.

🎃 Simple To Use: These striped balloons 18 inch can inflate with helium or air, can be self-sealed. After being inflated, reusable，the air outlet will be automatically sealed, no extra knot is needed, easy to use.

Apply To: Aluminum balloons for your theme birthday decor, anniversary parties, birthday parties, nightmare balloons,halloween baby shower decorations, ceremonies, holiday parties and many other occasions, black and white party decorations, making your party eye catching and wonderful.

👻 Wonderful Party Decoration: These foil balloons are good for party decorations, you can stick them against the wall or other surfaces, or just let helium balloons float in the air, Created DIY black and white birthday decorations and birthday decorations.
